name: chain_client_paid_me_1800_for_a_project_my_t
method:
client paid me $1800 for a project. my tool cost was $0.53. feeling like a goddamn genius rn ok so breakdown of my business economics:  
client project: landing page + contact form + chatbot client

stages.task: Playwright scrape Google Maps + Yelp for local businesses (restaurants, contractors, salons, dentists) with no website or Wix/Squarespace sites last updated >2 years
Score leads: has phone/email (2pts), reviews >50 (2pts), no chatbot (2pts), Wix/outdated site (3pts), category in high-LTV niches (1pt). Pass score >= 7

Generate personalized cold email + DM: 'I built [BusinessName] a landing page + chatbot in 25 minutes, here is a live demo [surge_url]. $1800 flat, delivered in 48h.' — attach auto-generated demo page
On client confirmation: Claude Code generates landing page + Tally contact form + Voiceflow chatbot embed, deploys to surge.sh subdomain, sends Stripe Payment Link for $1800
